summary: Iteration 116 - COMPREHENSIVE LIVE BROWSER CORS TESTING COMPLETE. All 12 CORS test scenarios passed through the Kubernetes/Cloudflare proxy (https://criminal-appeals-au-2.preview.emergentagent.com). The CORS fix (removing axios.defaults.withCredentials=true, using Bearer tokens from localStorage) is working correctly end-to-end. NO CORS ERRORS were found in browser console during any auth-gated flow.

cors_test_results.CORS_TEST_1_landing_page: PASS - Landing page loads without CORS errors
cors_test_results.CORS_TEST_2_email_password_login: PASS - Login with djkingy79@gmail.com redirects to /dashboard, no CORS errors
cors_test_results.CORS_TEST_3_dashboard_loads_cases: PASS - Dashboard shows 3 cases (Dummy Murder Appeal, R v Karlsson, R v HOMANN), API calls work through proxy
cors_test_results.CORS_TEST_4_case_detail_all_tabs: PASS - All tabs load without CORS errors: Documents(8), Timeline(8), Grounds(4), Notes(4), Reports(3), Legal, Progress, Collaboration
cors_test_results.CORS_TEST_5_logout_flow: PASS - Sign Out redirects to landing page, no CORS errors
cors_test_results.CORS_TEST_6_protected_route_after_logout: PASS - /dashboard redirects to landing page when not authenticated
cors_test_results.CORS_TEST_7_registration_flow: PASS - New user registration works, returns session_token, redirects to terms acceptance
cors_test_results.CORS_TEST_8_new_user_protected_access: PASS - New user can access protected routes after registration
cors_test_results.CORS_TEST_9_google_oauth_button: PASS - Google Sign In button exists with data-testid, redirect URL uses window.location.origin correctly
cors_test_results.CORS_TEST_10_api_calls_in_case_page: PASS - All API calls (documents, timeline, reports, notes, grounds, collaboration) work through proxy
cors_test_results.CORS_TEST_11_export_buttons: PASS - PDF All, Word All, Quick Export, Bundle Docs, Print All buttons all present and functional
cors_test_results.CORS_TEST_12_session_persistence: PASS - Session persists after page refresh, Bearer token in localStorage works correctly

cors_fix_verification.withCredentials_removed: VERIFIED - axios.defaults.withCredentials NOT set in App.js (line 57 only sets timeout)
cors_fix_verification.bearer_interceptor: VERIFIED - axios interceptor adds Authorization: Bearer from localStorage (lines 60-65)
cors_fix_verification.session_token_storage_authmodal: VERIFIED - AuthModal stores session_token in localStorage on login/register (line 75)
cors_fix_verification.session_token_storage_authcallback: VERIFIED - AuthCallback stores session_token in localStorage (line 88)
cors_fix_verification.cors_middleware: VERIFIED - Backend uses allow_origin_regex=r'.*' with allow_credentials=True (server.py lines 7496-7502)
cors_fix_verification.auth_utils_bearer_support: VERIFIED - get_current_user checks cookie, query param, then Bearer header (auth_utils.py lines 15-21)

browser_console_logs.cors_errors: NONE - No CORS errors found in any flow
browser_console_logs.auth_errors: NONE - No 401 errors during authenticated flows
browser_console_logs.other_errors: NONE - Only React DevTools info message and ServiceWorker registration success

success_rate.backend: 100% - All auth endpoints working through proxy

test_credentials.note: Admin account verified working, bypasses paywalls

seed_data_creation: Created test user: test_cors_9bnc01e0@example.com for registration flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: CORS fix fully verified in iteration 116 through LIVE BROWSER testing via Kubernetes/Cloudflare proxy. The fix: (1) Removed axios.defaults.withCredentials=true from App.js, (2) Auth uses Bearer tokens from localStorage exclusively, (3) axios interceptor adds Authorization header automatically, (4) Login/register endpoints return session_token in response body. All auth-gated flows tested: login, dashboard, case detail with all tabs, logout, registration, protected routes. NO CORS ERRORS in browser console. Google OAuth button exists with correct redirect URL construction using window.location.origin.
testing_method: Playwright browser automation with console log capture
